function solve(s) {
    const N = s.length;
    let maxL = 0;
    
    // Map to store the first index where a prefix sum was encountered: {sum: index}
    // Index 0 corresponds to the prefix sum before the string starts (sum = 0).
    const firstOccurrence = new Map();
    firstOccurrence.set(0, 0);
    
    let currentSum = 0;
    
    for (let k = 1; k <= N; k++) {
        // s[k-1] is the current character being processed
        const char = s[k - 1];
        
        // Assign value: '1' -> +1, '0' -> -1
        const value = char === '1' ? 1 : -1;
        currentSum += value;
        
        // We seek indices i < k such that:
        // 1. currentSum - P[i] = 0  => P[i] = currentSum (Imbalance 0)
        // 2. currentSum - P[i] = 2  => P[i] = currentSum - 2 (Imbalance +2: too many '1's)
        // 3. currentSum - P[i] = -2 => P[i] = currentSum + 2 (Imbalance -2: too many '0's)
        
        const targets = [
            currentSum, 
            currentSum - 2, 
            currentSum + 2
        ];
        
        for (const targetSum of targets) {
            if (firstOccurrence.has(targetSum)) {
                const i = firstOccurrence.get(targetSum);
                const length = k - i;
                if (length > maxL) {
                    maxL = length;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Record the first occurrence of the current sum
        if (!firstOccurrence.has(currentSum)) {
            firstOccurrence.set(currentSum, k);
        }
    }
    
    // The logic automatically handles the case where maxL remains 0 (Example 2).
    return maxL;
}
